LLM backend: switched from Anthropic Claude Haiku to Google Gemini 3 Flash Preview. Anthropic OAuth tokens (Max subscription) not permitted for non-Claude-Code use per Anthropic policy. GOOGLE_API_KEY already available for embeddings, reused for LLM.

DJ-002 [llm]: Anthropic Haiku replaced by Gemini 3 Flash Preview. Reason: Max subscription OAuth tokens restricted to Claude Code/Claude.ai only. Google API key already in use for embeddings — single key for both embed + LLM.
Dockerfile: /app/state dir owned by root, brain user (UID 1000) got PermissionError. Fixed: mkdir + chown before USER switch.
Converted openclaw from git submodule to inlined files. Repo is now self-contained — clone and run anywhere without upstream access.

Agent identity: no preset name or persona. Newborn agent (agentId=default) discovers identity through bootstrap milestones. BOOTSTRAP_PROMPT injected until all 10 milestones achieved.

Session 13 complete: OpenClaw agent runtime setup (3 containers live, memory-brain plugin active, Gemini 3 Flash, WebChat on :18789). Decisions D-007 (agent LLM) + D-008 (no preset identity). Next: end-to-end test via WebChat.

Partial e2e test: WebChat connected (gateway token + device pairing resolved), agent responds via Gemini Flash, context assembly works ([IDENTITY] bootstrapping, [COGNITIVE STATE] gut no signal). Gate correctly buffers trivial messages (score=0.27). Memory-brain plugin fires /context/assemble + /memory/gate on each turn.

Hunger curve: gate threshold dynamically adjusts based on memory count. Newborn agents (0 memories) get 2.5x score boost via exp(-count/10) decay. BUFFER promoted to PERSIST when boosted score >= 0.5. Solves cold-start problem where gate blocked all memories for empty agents.

DJ-003 [gate]: Hunger curve added to ExitGate. WHY: newborn agent scored 0.27 on all messages (peripheral×novel, s_i=0.35 default, base_score=0.40) — always buffered, never stored. With 0 memories there's no identity to compare against, so everything looks peripheral. Fix: multiplicative hunger boost that tapers as memories accumulate. Memory count sets the floor, gut adjusts from there.

Hunger curve implemented in gate.py: ExitGateConfig gets hunger_max_boost=2.5 + hunger_decay_constant=10.0, ExitGate._hunger_boost() exponential decay method, score *= hunger in evaluate(), BUFFER→PERSIST promotion when score>=0.5 and hunger>1.05. api.py fetches memory_count and passes to evaluate(). Logs include hunger= and memories= for observability.

Hunger curve verified: 0 memories→hunger=2.50→score=0.66→PERSIST (was 0.27→BUFFER). Decay confirmed across 5 sequential stores: hunger 2.50→2.36→2.23→2.11→2.01, all persisted. Logs show 'Hunger promotion: BUFFER → PERSIST' with exact values.
Updated KB_01_architecture.md Phase 2: added hunger curve to score formula, gate wiring table (memory_count param), fallback behavior note, DJ-003 in decision journal

Session 14 complete: e2e test (partial — agent responds, context assembly works), hunger curve (D-009, DJ-003) fixes cold-start, gate architecture brainstorm queued for next session (agent response capture, chunking, conversation-level gating, source tags). Files: gate.py, api.py, KB_01.

Gate input preparation: (1) pre-gate chunking — chunkText() splits long messages by paragraph then sentence boundaries into ~500 char chunks, replaces hard drop cap, (2) assistant message capture — agent_end hook now processes both user (source_tag=auto_capture) and assistant (source_tag=self_reflection) messages, (3) gate call budget — max 10 calls per turn replacing slice(0,3). Files: memory-brain/index.ts, openclaw.plugin.json
Updated KB_01_architecture.md: Phase 2 gate plugin section (chunking, assistant capture, gate budget, source tags), Phase 1 plugin config (captureMaxChars semantics, capture scope)

Gate input prep verified: docker compose build openclaw succeeded, container started, plugin registered. Brain logs show 3 gate calls from single exchange (memories 3→4→5), hunger tapering (2.11→2.01→1.91), all persisted. Chunking + assistant capture confirmed working.

OpenClaw default AGENTS.md must be replaced: built-in default instructs agent to use file-based SOUL.md/MEMORY.md/memory/ which conflicts with brain-based memory. writeFileIfMissing() recreates default if missing — must provide custom AGENTS.md in workspace. Added T-P9 to roadmap.

DMN observability needed: agent inner monologue (DMN thoughts, rumination threads, consolidation insights, tension memories) currently scattered across ephemeral queues, disk JSON, and DB rows with no unified view. Added T-P10 to roadmap.

Session 15: Gate input preparation (chunking + assistant capture + 10-call budget), verified in docker. Discovered OpenClaw default AGENTS.md conflict (T-P9). Added DMN observability task (T-P10). Roadmap updated. Brain running: 12 memories, DMN active (11 heartbeats for default), consolidation found first tension memory. [[reply_to_current]] tag leak still present.

Fixed broken retrieval mutation loop: context assembly was calling search_hybrid(mutate=False) — memories were read but never marked as accessed. access_count stuck at 0, depth_weight_alpha stuck at 1.0, consolidation decay pushed beta up unchecked. Death spiral: weight centers dropped below 0.3, _get_identity_embeddings() returned None, gate ran blind (s_i=0.35), couldn't persist new memories. Files: memory.py, context_assembly.py, api.py, gate.py, consolidation.py

Two mutation types for memory access: (1) access_count + alpha boost for memories injected into agent context (influences output), (2) last_accessed refresh only for gate novelty comparison (prevents decay for 24h but doesn't count as real retrieval). 'Stay of execution, not a promotion.'

Separated access_count from alpha boost in apply_retrieval_mutation(). access_count always increments (factual counter, not subject to safety). Alpha boost goes through safety check (DiminishingReturns, TwoGateGuardrail). Previously both were bundled behind safety — TwoGateGuardrail Phase B blocked both during consolidation windows.

Fixed apply_retrieval_mutation() bundling access_count increment with alpha boost behind safety check. TwoGateGuardrail (Phase B, consolidation-time) was rejecting all mutations with 'Gate 1: insufficient evidence (count=0)' because access_count was passed as evidence but was always 0. Split into two operations: unconditional access_count UPDATE, then safety-gated alpha boost UPDATE.

New memory.py:touch_memory() method — refreshes last_accessed without incrementing access_count or modifying alpha/beta. Used by gate novelty check to prevent decay for 24h on referenced memories. Skips immutable via WHERE clause.
check_novelty() now returns 3-tuple (is_novel, max_similarity, most_similar_id). Gate uses most_similar_id for touch_memory(). Added id to SELECT (zero cost). consolidation.py updated for compat.

context_assembly.py:assemble_context() now tracks and returns injected_memory_ids — list of memory IDs that survived budget trimming and were actually injected into system prompt. api.py calls apply_retrieval_mutation() on these after assembly.

Added AND NOT immutable to apply_retrieval_mutation() alpha boost UPDATE. Previously immutable memories could have their weights modified via retrieval reinforcement. Matches existing pattern in _decay_tick() and near-miss handling.

One-time DB rescue: reset depth_weight_beta to 4.0 for 20 never-accessed memories where beta had inflated to avg 5.61 from unchecked consolidation decay. Condition: access_count=0 AND NOT immutable AND depth_weight_beta > 4.0.

Verified mutation loop: context assembly triggers access_count increments (7+ hits on frequently-injected memories), alpha climbing (1.0→1.256), weight centers rising (0.17→0.24). Bootstrap milestone 'First Retrieval' now achieved (3/10). New content persisting through gate (peripheral×contradicting→persist). Brain healthy: 38 memories, 3 agents.

DJ-004: Death spiral from disconnected retrieval mutation loop. Context assembly was read-only, safety blocked access_count, consolidation decay ran unchecked. Fixed with two mutation types (D-012) and separated access_count from safety (D-013).

Updated KB_01_architecture.md: gate section (touch_memory, check_novelty 3-tuple), context assembly section (retrieval mutation, injected_memory_ids), memory store table (touch_memory, check_novelty return type), apply_retrieval_mutation internals (D-013 split), DJ-004 entry.

Brainstorm: idle decay problem — agent forgets everything when idle because consolidation decay runs on wall-clock (beta +0.01/5min) but reinforcement only fires during conversation. DMN daydreaming should call touch_memory() on sampled memories to keep them alive during idle. Daydreaming = memory maintenance.

Brainstorm: identity memory selection must be vector-relevant, not just weight-ranked. Current: top-N by weight center + stochastic Beta sampling (no query relevance). Proposed: injection_score = weight_center * (0.3 + 0.7 * cosine_sim(memory_emb, query_emb)). Use determines identity — you are what you practice. Irrelevant identity naturally decays by not being reinforced.

Brainstorm: contradiction resolution must fact-check, not reinforce stronger belief. If fact-checkable: LLM verifies → displace loser → create replacement memory ('I used to believe X, Y is true') → transfer old weight. If NOT fact-checkable: do nothing, log tension, wait for external evidence. Reinforcing belief from belief = echo chamber hallucination.

Brainstorm: split identity into core (always injected: name/persona/values, immutable seeds + highest weight) and active (query-relevant, vector-scored, only relevant ones get reinforced). Active identity that never matches queries stops being reinforced → decay takes over naturally. No random near-miss punishment.

Session 16: (1) Fixed retrieval mutation loop death spiral — 5 files changed, D-012/D-013/DJ-004. access_count now incrementing, alpha climbing, bootstrap 3/10. (2) Brainstormed next-gen identity/decay architecture — D-014 (DMN touch), D-015 (vector-relevant identity selection), D-016 (fact-check contradictions, no echo chamber), D-017 (core vs active identity split). All brainstorm decisions need implementation plans.

D-015 REVISED: injection_score = weight_center * cosine_sim (no floor). All non-immutable memories vector-scored. Zero relevance = zero score regardless of weight. Irrelevant high-weight memories never injected → never reinforced → naturally decay. Log all w×s interactions for formula evaluation.

D-016 REVISED: Consolidation spawns agent research session (not internal fact-check). LLM judges worthiness first (factual/subjective, research yes/no, confidence>0.7). 1/hour max 24/day. Priority: highest single weight. Skip both-below-0.3. HIGH confidence required to displace loser.

D-017 REVISED: No core tier. Identity hash DORMANT (feature-flagged off). System prompt = immutables + w×s scored memories only. Core values emerge from behavioral patterns via consolidation insights, not explicit storage. 'You are what you practice, not what you once thought.'

D-018a: Adaptive context shift threshold. Active identity cached, recomputed only when context_shift > P75 of last 200 values (self-evolving). Bootstrap default 0.5 until buffer fills. Avoids fixed cutoff that doesn't adapt to agent's conversation patterns.

D-018b: Full memory injection, no truncation. Gate enforces max ~300 tokens per memory. Content > 300 tokens → semantic chunking into separate linked memories at gate time. Embedding computed from full chunk text. Token budget limits how many memories injected, not how much of each.

D-018c: Memory groups. Chunks linked by memory_group_id. Any chunk accessed → all group members get touch_memory() (beta refresh). Injected chunks include group metadata. Insights synthesized from single group share group_id. Consolidation creates synthesis insights across groups, never merges chunks.

D-018d: w×s interaction logging + 3-tier analysis. injection_logs DB table. Tier 1: real-time rolling metrics (in-memory). Tier 2: daily batch analysis + behavioral decision classification via LLM. Tier 3: weekly anomaly detection with DMN-routed alerts. Behavioral correlation: did injected memories influence agent behavior?

D-019: Proactive notifications. Urgency (time-sensitive) ≠ importance (content significance) ≠ weight (reinforcement history). Urgent → push notify immediately via configured channel (Telegram/WhatsApp/webhook). Important → 'btw' next conversation. notification_outbox DB table + delivery worker + quiet hours + user preferences.
D-020: AGENTS.md web search rule. Brain memory is trusted source; LLM training data is NOT. Agent must verify facts from training data via web search. Rate limit: max 3 searches per turn.

D-021: Consolidation pattern detection. Run 1/day. Pre-filter (weight>0.25, access>2) → HDBSCAN cluster embeddings → per-cluster LLM pattern analysis → cross-cluster summary. 1-level recursion (insights→meta-insights, but meta-insights excluded from future detection). No cap on insights. Dedup at sim>0.85. Insight weights = weighted average by center of source memories.

DJ-005 [identity]: D-015 floor dropped. Was: injection_score = weight_center * (0.3 + 0.7 * cosine_sim) — floor guaranteed minimum score for irrelevant high-weight memories. Now: weight_center * cosine_sim — zero relevance = zero score. WHY: any floor creates immortal memories by guaranteeing injection → reinforcement regardless of relevance. User insight: all non-immutable memories must compete on relevance to allow natural decay.

DJ-006 [identity]: D-017 core/active split dropped. Was: core tier (always injected, immutable + high weight + high access_count), active tier (vector-scored). Now: no core tier, identity hash dormant, everything competes on w×s. WHY: core tier would always be reinforced (injected every turn → access_count always climbing → can never accumulate beta). Core values should emerge from behavioral patterns, not from protected tiers. User insight: strong ego = rigid agent, less identity injection = better performance.

DJ-007 [consolidation]: D-016 revised from internal fact-check to agent research session. Was: LLM fact-checks from training knowledge. Now: contradiction spawns full agent session with web search tools. WHY: training data not trustworthy for factual verification. Agent should use same research tools as regular conversation. Budget: 1/hour, 24/day max. LLM judges worthiness before spawning session.

Updated KB_01_architecture.md Decision Journal: DJ-005 (floor dropped), DJ-006 (core/active split dropped), DJ-007 (consolidation research sessions). Added Session 17 brainstorm decisions summary section.

Session 17: Extended brainstorm — revised D-015/D-016/D-017, created D-018a-d/D-019/D-020/D-021, DJ-005/DJ-006/DJ-007, T-P11. Key shifts: dropped floor from identity scoring (pure w×s), dropped core identity tier (hash dormant), consolidation uses agent research sessions with web search, adaptive context shift threshold (P75), memory chunking with groups, 3-tier injection analytics, proactive notifications (urgency≠importance≠weight), pattern detection with HDBSCAN clustering.
D-022: Reduce decay tick interval from 5min to 1h. Decay pressure drops from 0.12 beta/hr to 0.01 beta/hr (12x reduction). Prevents idle-state memory death spiral.

D-023: Consolidation dedup+reinforce. All 4 creation paths (tensions, insights, narratives, revalidation) check novelty at sim>=0.85 before creating. If not novel, reinforce existing memory via apply_retrieval_mutation instead of creating new. Prevents duplicate memory flood.

D-024: DMN cold-start fallback. When all 4 sampling channels return None (unreachable thresholds for young agent), fall back to weight-proportional random sampling from all memories. Floor 0.01 on weights to avoid zero-probability.

D-025: Insight weight inheritance. store_insight computes weighted-average alpha/beta from source memories (heavy sources skew more via center-weighted average). No source importance demotion — sources keep weight until insight proves itself through retrieval.

Root cause found: gemini-3-flash-preview is a thinking model. Internal chain-of-thought consumes from max_output_tokens budget. With max_tokens=200, model spends ~180 on thinking, leaves ~20 for output. All consolidation insights are sentence fragments (14-50 chars). 101/109 memories are consolidation-generated junk. Fix: disable thinking for consolidation calls or raise budget.
IMPLEMENTED: DECAY_TICK_INTERVAL 300→3600 in consolidation.py
IMPLEMENTED: Dedup+reinforce in all 4 consolidation creation paths (consolidation.py)
IMPLEMENTED: DMN cold-start fallback with weight-proportional sampling (idle.py)
IMPLEMENTED: Insight weight inheritance + no source demotion (memory.py store_insight + store_memory initial_alpha/beta params)
Updated KB_01_architecture.md: consolidation section (D-022 decay interval, D-023 dedup+reinforce all paths, D-025 weight inheritance, BUG-001 thinking model truncation), DMN section pending

Fixed: removed max_output_tokens from llm.py. gemini-3-flash-preview thinking model now runs unrestricted. Output: 5 complete insights (115 tokens) vs before: 1 truncated fragment (19 tokens). Legacy max_tokens param kept on retry_llm_call for call-site compat.

Session 18: Idle-state sustainability fixes. D-022 (decay 1h), D-023 (dedup+reinforce all 4 paths), D-024 (DMN cold-start fallback), D-025 (insight weight inheritance). BUG-001 found+fixed (Gemini thinking model ate output tokens). 101/109 memories are junk fragments. Next: clean DB, restart brain, verify.

Deleted 100 junk consolidation memories from default agent (truncated fragments from BUG-001). Kept 1 legitimate 289-char narrative identity memory. Deleted 456 orphaned memory_supersedes rows. Pool: 109→9 memories.

T-S18 deploy verified: brain rebuilt+restarted with D-022/D-023/D-024/D-025+BUG-001 fix. 16 new consolidation memories created in 30s, all 124-369 chars (full output, not truncated). 3 containers healthy. Default agent: 25 memories post-consolidation.
Session 19 phase 1: T-S18 deploy complete. DB cleanup (100 junk deleted), BUG-001 verified fixed, brain restarted, consolidation producing full output.
T-P9: AGENTS.md updated with D-020 web search rules (brain memory > web > training, max 3/turn) and reply tag leak fix (never echo [[reply_to_current]]). Synced workspace to config.

T-P10: DMN observability. Added dmn_log table for thought persistence, GET /monologue/{agent_id} unified endpoint (thoughts + consolidation + tension/narrative + rumination state), monologue tool in OpenClaw plugin.
T-P9+T-P10 verified: AGENTS.md has web search rules + tag suppression. /monologue/default returns unified timeline. dmn_log table persisting (16 rows in first minute).
KB_01_architecture.md updated: Phase 6 DMN section (dmn_log table, /monologue endpoint, thought persistence), OpenClaw runtime section (AGENTS.md content, 20 endpoints, 9 tools).
Session 19 complete: T-S18 deploy + T-P9 (AGENTS.md D-020 + tag leak) + T-P10 (DMN observability: dmn_log + /monologue + plugin tool). Next: D-014, identity rework, T-P11.
CQ-001: Replaced unsafe dir() check with explicit None via batch mem_map lookup in apply_retrieval_mutation. Eliminates cross-iteration variable leak.
CQ-002: Batched access_count/last_accessed/timestamps UPDATE into single WHERE id=ANY($1). Uniform alpha +0.1 also batched when no safety. ~50 queries → ~3.
CQ-003: Near-miss beta bump collapsed to single UPDATE WHERE id=ANY($1) AND NOT immutable. Eliminates per-ID immutability fetchval. 30 queries → 1.
CQ-004: Co-access UPSERTs batched via unnest arrays. 10 per-pair round-trips → 1 query.
KB_01_architecture.md: Updated apply_retrieval_mutation internals to reflect batched SQL (T-B01 CQ-001/002/003/004).
Session 20 complete: T-B01 (CQ-001/002/003/004) — batched retrieval mutation SQL (~50→~3 queries), eliminated dir() bug, batched co-access UPSERTs. Next: T-B02, T-B03, T-P12.

CQ-005: _promote_patterns now routes alpha boosts (goal +2.0, identity +5.0) through SafetyMonitor.check_weight_change(). HardCeiling (0.95 max) and DiminishingReturns enforced. Added depth_weight_alpha/beta to SELECT queries. Blocked promotions logged.

CQ-006: _decay_and_reconsolidate deep decay (beta+=1.0) and insight weakening now route through safety.check_weight_change(). Stale bulk UPDATE converted to per-row safety check then batch UPDATE on allowed IDs. Added alpha/beta to get_stale_memories and insight_rows queries.
Plumbed cycle_id to consolidation step functions via DeepConsolidation._current_cycle_id instance attribute. Phase B rate limiting now functional for promotion and decay steps.
KB_01_architecture.md: Updated _promote_patterns and _decay_and_reconsolidate descriptions with CQ-005/CQ-006 safety routing. Updated safety wiring section with cycle_id plumbing.

Session 21 complete: T-B02 (CQ-005/CQ-006) — promotion + decay safety bypass fixed. Alpha boosts through HardCeiling+DiminishingReturns, beta boosts through entropy/rate checks. cycle_id plumbed. Next: T-B03, T-P12, T-B04.

T-B03: Fixed 3 unreachable bootstrap milestones. M5: check dmn_log instead of memories for source_tag=internal_dmn. M7: check type=tension instead of metadata resolved=true. M8: check type=narrative instead of metadata creative_insight.
KB_01_architecture.md: Updated Phase 8 milestone descriptions 5/7/8 with corrected checks and CQ-019 fix notes.

T-P12: Replaced stochastic identity injection with w×s scoring (weight_center × cosine_sim). New score_identity_wxs() method in MemoryStore computes injection_score in SQL via pgvector. Context assembly now embeds query_text and ranks identity memories by injection_score within token budget.

T-P12: Identity hash feature-flagged dormant (IDENTITY_HASH_ENABLED=False). render_identity_hash() skipped during context assembly. API endpoints still functional. Prompt header renamed to [ACTIVE IDENTITY].
KB_01_architecture.md: Updated Phase 3 context assembly description — w×s scoring replaces stochastic identity, identity hash dormant, new prompt structure, dependency graph updated.
Session 23 complete: T-P12 (D-015/D-017) — w×s identity scoring replaces stochastic injection, identity hash dormant, plan Phase 1 DONE. Next: T-B04, T-B05, T-B06.
T-B04: embed_batch() rewritten for true Gemini batch API — passes contents=list to embed_content(), 1 API call per 100 texts instead of N individual calls. Retry logic preserved.

T-B04: Gate triple-embed eliminated. check_novelty() accepts optional pre-computed embedding. ExitGate.evaluate() reuses initial embedding + fetches contradiction content via get_memory(id) instead of re-searching. 3 embed calls → 1.

KB_01_architecture.md: Updated memory method table (embed_batch true batch, check_novelty embedding param), gate novelty description (single embed, get_memory for contradiction), dependency graph (gate no longer depends on search_similar).

T-B05: DMN creative channel always wins. _classify_channel() checked len(activated)>0 — any co-access triggered DMN/creative. Added MIN_CREATIVE_ACTIVATION=0.15 threshold requiring max(scores)>=0.15 (≥3 co-accesses at hop 0). Enables DMN/identity and DMN/reflect channels to activate.

T-B05: Monologue key mismatch. api.py read ct.get('resolution_reason') but rumination.py stores completed threads with key 'reason'. Fixed to ct.get('reason'). Response field name unchanged (API contract preserved).

T-B05: JSONB double-serialization in _log_consolidation(). json.dumps(details) passed to asyncpg JSONB column caused double-serialization (stored JSON string literals, not objects). Fixed: pass dict directly. asyncpg's default JSONB codec handles json.dumps internally.
KB_01_architecture.md: Updated _classify_channel creative threshold (CQ-025), consolidation_log JSONB note (CQ-014), monologue endpoint reason key (CQ-023).

T-P13: Injection logging + w×s analytics (D-018d). injection_logs table (SERIAL PK, 8 columns, 3 indexes). context_assembly.py logs all identity candidates after w×s scoring (non-blocking batch INSERT via executemany). GET /injection/metrics endpoint with percentiles (p50/p75/p95), injection_rate, top-10 memories by count.
KB_01_architecture.md: Added injection logging to Phase 3 context assembly (D-018d), injection_logs DB table description, GET /injection/metrics endpoint spec.
